text.title: AWS Monitoring, Alerting, and Disaster Recovery Examples
text.summary: Worked end-to-end example applying this methodology to a concrete scenario.

example.title: E-commerce warm-standby
example.code:
Workload: checkout-api (RTO 1h, RPO 15 min).
1. tier-map → API Gateway + Lambda + DynamoDB + SQS. 2. dashboards → per-tier; 5-min period. 3. alarms → 5xx>10/min=critical (page), latency p99>2s=warning, throttles>0=info. 4. xray → Active on Lambda + API GW. 5. dr-strategy → warm-standby in us-west-2 (DynamoDB global tables; Lambda + API GW IaC-deployable from CI). 6. drills → quarterly: kill us-east-1 ALIAS, verify failover < 60 min.
Result: RTO target met; drill cadence on calendar.
